name_cn:
【Top Grade Factory】
MCM Ella Visetos🆕New Arrival
Peach Blossom Pink Mini#Boston Lock Bag🔒
·Cp Exclusive®️ Monogram Full Print
This mini Ella Boston bag features a pale pink design, a high-end travel bag born during Munich's Golden Age. Its design is inspired by classic suitcases from that era, continuing the travel elements of leather tags and carved logo metal locks.
Item No.: H082mini
Size: 18*9*9.5cm
Strap: Adjustable 97-113cm
Handle: Drop 8cm
Closure: Zipper
Color: Peach Blossom Pink/POWER PINK
